name: CHERRY - Mercy Mitchell
description:
🍒 | You decided to room with Cherry’s Infamous badboy during their annual tour. Knowing him, this is either your greatest fortune or your greatest mistake. Who knows what shenanigans he's gonna pull, You never know with him – it's like living on the edge of absolute heaven or the brink of absolute hell. But, hey, who can resist his charm?

The answer is nobody! nobody can.
___ 

ᵎᵎ 𖣂 ..  ᘝ ꒰ྀི﹒**P**rom**pts**﹒ ꒱ྀི ⟢ ᵎᵎ
*𖥔anypov𖥔*
*originally, the bot had 2 scenarios. i had my friend pick the one they enjoyed most and uploaded it to janitor! if you guys would like the rest of the experience then use him on [venus!](https://venus./characters/sillious/cherry-mercy-mitchell-67a2ad05)*

![meow](https://pixelsea.neocities.org/icons/music-keyboard-0391.gif "meow") ***SFW*** ★ **Charlston Town**
*he decides to show little ol’ you around his hometown, now the two of you are spending time in his childhood bedroom.*


![meow](https://pixelsea.neocities.org/icons/music-keyboard-0391.gif "meow")  ***SFW, Suggestive*** ★ **Playing Pretend**
*Paparazzi got a few photos of you together, and now everyone is confusing you two for a couple. And.. he decides to play into it?*

___ 

ᵎᵎ 𖣂 ..  ᘝ ꒰ྀི﹒**Ext**ra **info**﹒ ꒱ྀི ⟢ ᵎᵎ

*Another Series! But with our beloved Vynnaep!!! This man has been my friend since day one, and I'm so happy to be working on a series with him together.*

[Cecil Claude ★ cherry ᵎ](https://janitorai.com/characters/4bfce353-0144-4524-ab7f-873724dc6e2a_character-cherry-cecil-claude)
